About Me

Data doesn't lie — but it does need the right person to make it speak. I'm a Data Analyst with 2+ years of professional experience delivering end-to-end analytics solutions — from engineering scalable cloud pipelines to building executive-level Power BI dashboards. I specialise in translating raw, complex data into clear business decisions that drive measurable outcomes.


My work spans the full data lifecycle: ETL/ELT pipeline development on AWS and Azure, SQL performance optimisation for mission-critical reporting, predictive modelling in Python, and BI dashboard delivery with Power BI and DAX. I've built production-grade cloud solutions on live energy market data and developed a real-time Azure ML retraining pipeline achieving 84% adaptive accuracy on 13,000+ healthcare records.


What sets me apart is operational grounding — I understand not just the data, but the business context behind it. Having worked across analytics, retail operations, and healthcare data environments, I frame every analysis around the decision it needs to support.

Currently based in Germany. Targeting Data Analyst and BI roles with hands-on project experience in German electricity market data (SMARD). Available immediately.

Projects

End-to-end solutions — from raw data to business insight

Featured · Completed

German Energy Analytics Pipeline

End-to-end Azure pipeline processing 17,500+ hourly records from official German electricity market data (SMARD). Azure Blob Storage → ADF → Azure SQL → Power BI. Engineered multi-source ingestion resolving BOM encoding, mixed delimiters, and DST duplicates.

Azure ADF Azure SQL Power BI DAX
Completed

UK Online Retail Analysis

Cleaned and processed 4.7M+ transactional records in Python. Built RFM segmentation in SQL to classify customer value tiers. Delivered a multi-page Power BI dashboard with DAX measures for MoM growth and return-adjusted revenue.

Python MySQL Power BI RFM
MSc Thesis

Azure ML Healthcare Retraining Pipeline

Real-time adaptive ML pipeline for pancreatic cancer classification. Random Forest on 13,000+ patient records with automated concept drift detection and retraining. Achieved 84% adaptive accuracy with end-to-end Azure architecture.

Azure ML Random Forest Python Scikit-learn
Completed

Dublin Bikes — Demand Forecasting & Resource Allocation

Modelled a city-wide bike-sharing system to optimise bike allocation across stations under demand imbalance. Applied ML models to predict peak usage locations and time periods, improving distribution efficiency.

Python Scikit-learn Forecasting ML
